nodes.label: Incremental Update (--update)
nodes.rationale: Only re-extracts new/changed files to save tokens; code-only changes skip semantic extraction entirely; prune_sources is only for genuinely deleted files because build_merge's replace-on-re-extract reconciles changed files (#1344, #1178)

nodes.label: build_merge Graph Merge
nodes.rationale: Reads graph.json directly without a NetworkX round-trip so edge direction is always preserved (#801); root= relativizes prune paths so stale nodes do not accumulate (#1361)

nodes.label: Cluster-Only Rerun
nodes.rationale: Self-contained CLI command; Steps 5-9 must not be re-run because they read intermediate files already deleted by a prior cleanup (#1392)
